mapper.select: SELECT * FROM health_profile ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM health_profile WHERE risk_level = #{riskLevel} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_profile (user_id, age, gender, height, weight, occupation, medical_history, allergy_history, surgery_history, exercise_history, exercise_habits, exercise_preference, sleep_habits, diet_habits, smoking_status, drinking_status, risk_level, risk_factors) VALUES (#{userId}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{occupation}, #{medicalHistory}, #{allergyHistory}, #{surgeryHistory}, #{exerciseHistory}, #{exerciseHabits}, #{exercisePreference}, #{sleepHabits}, #{dietHabits}, #{smokingStatus}, #{drinkingStatus}, #{riskLevel}, #{riskFactors})
